reviews.comment:
En las últimas semanas la única frase con la que te reciben es "no tengo sistema".
Se c...gan en la gente...
Tantas semanas tardan en volver a tener sistema?

(Translated by Google)
In recent weeks, the only thing they've said to you is "I don't have a system."
They're shitting on people...
It takes so many weeks to get a system back?
